item.title: Tung Tung Tung Sahur is doing @71cent’s viral dance to Cradles by Sub Urban in this original post by @broccolicheddarrr, turning Triple T into a dark and dreamy brainrot dance meme. The eerie Cradles sound, smooth @71cent movement, and chaotic Tung Tung T

item.title: BRAINROTS STRIKE! the brainrots have attacked the big chungus refinery as a last resort to show resistance and the power the brainrots still hold. This attack may have been a faliure but it has definetly shown that the great meme reset still isnt invincib
